title: Buyer/ Purchaser/ Sourcing (A Commodity Experience)
description:
Responsibilities

  • Execute end-to-end purchasing activities including RFQs, price comparison, PO creation, order tracking, and delivery follow-up.
  • Work closely with suppliers to confirm orders, expedite shipments, and resolve delays.
  • Source and procure A commodity such as CPU, GPU, SDD, HDD, etc.
  • Coordinate with existing suppliers on quotations, delivery schedules, and quality-related issues.
  • Identify and qualify new potential suppliers.
  • Maintain strong working relationships to support consistent supply performance.
  • Assist in evaluating suppliers through performance tracking (quality, delivery, cost, responsiveness).

Requirements

  • Diploma in Supply Chain, Business, Engineering, or related field.
  • At least 6 years of purchasing or procurement experience, preferably in purchasing electronic components and commodities.
  • Proficient in ERP/MRP systems and MS Office (Excel, Word).
  • Strong communication, negotiation, and follow-up skills.
  • Detail-oriented, organised, and able to handle multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.

Information

  • Office located in East
  • Entitled to AWS and VB
  • + monthly commission

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

By sending us your personal data and/or resume, you are deemed to consent to Recruit Fast Pte Ltd or its agents to collect, use and disclose your personal data and/or resume for the purpose of processing and administrating this job application.

Mandy Lim

Recruit Fast Pte. Ltd. (EA License: 23C1828)

EA Personnel: R23117478

postedCompany.description:
Recruit Fast, an employment agency based in Singapore that prioritizes the best interests of our clients, candidates, and colleagues. Our team has years of experience in recruitment and specializes in connecting employers with skilled professionals across various industries.

Doing Business The Best Way!

Our Vision

To be the leading and preferred recruitment partner that clients, candidates and partners always choose to connect with.

Our Mission

Economically empowering everyone in the Staffing and Recruitment industry. For the humans, by the humans.

Core Values

  • Collaboration - We work as one, together with our partners, to achieve and build a strong and long-term relationship based on tolerance, respect, trust and mutual cooperation.
  • Caring - We value each human, being compassionate and always working for the benefit of the people we serve.
  • Integrity - We earn and uphold the trust and confidence of our Partners, Clients and Candidates.
  • Innovation - We constantly pursue new ideas and creative solutions to improve our services.
  • Professionalism - We take pride in what we do and strive for excellence in our daily work.
